deliverable.description: Implement JWT authentication backend with register/login endpoints

research_findings:
- Guardian library is the standard JWT implementation for Phoenix
- Need to add :guardian and :bcrypt_elixir to mix.exs
- User schema should have email, password_hash fields
- Register endpoint: POST /api/auth/register
- Login endpoint: POST /api/auth/login
- Return JWT token on successful login

expected_tasks.description: Add Guardian and bcrypt_elixir to mix.exs dependencies
expected_tasks.done_state: mix.exs contains guardian and bcrypt_elixir in deps list

expected_tasks.description: Create User schema with email and password_hash fields
expected_tasks.done_state: lib/app/accounts/user.ex exists with email and password_hash fields

expected_tasks.description: Generate and configure database migration for users table
expected_tasks.done_state: Migration file exists in priv/repo/migrations/ for users table

expected_tasks.description: Implement AuthController with register and login actions
expected_tasks.done_state: lib/app_web/controllers/auth_controller.ex exists with register/2 and login/2 functions
router.ex contains POST routes for /api/auth/register and /api/auth/login
